title: [codereview-pass3] LR1110.cs edge cases
description: Pass 3: Blocking WaitForRxResponse() will deadlock nRF52840 SPI during RX (as fixed in SX1262 readerThread). RX_PACKET parsing assumes exact format from sim (payload+ rssi+snr). GNSS opcode stubs log but don't integrate with GPS.cs or AG3335. Add StartReader/DispatchMessage/ReaderLoop methods. No lock in Transmit for Idle state. Fix all before next chunk.
